DawnFire, Morning Star of Light  
 

Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Blunt Atk Delay: 34
DMG: 11 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WIS: +7
SV DISEASE: +10 SV POISON: +10
Effect: Banish Undead (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 40
WT: 6.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: CLR
Race: HUM ERU HIE DEF DWF HFL GNM FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Dawnfire

# Jul 28 2012 at 8:46 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593971919544
9 posts
This dropped w/ a twin off of Terror today 7/28/12. Still appears to be a fairly nice item though these days it is a tad old. Tunare server currently has sellers w/ it for 10k. Personally I would like to sell it for 20k. But probably wouldn't receive much more then that.
▲ Page top
Why?
QuoteReply
# Nov 11 2009 at 10:53 AM Rating: Decent
animekenji
1,123 posts
I wonder why C-T uses a wep that procs an anti-undead spell. It's not as if it's going to be of any use against the players trying to take it away from him (except for necro/sk pets).
____________________________
If you were me and I were you, would we still be friends?
▲ Page top
Why?
QuoteReply
# Nov 11 2009 at 12:15 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1641773856190
Scholar
2,308 posts
Ah but it will proc against players in skelly form. I had the fabled ghoulbane proc on my sk in skelly form for example when I was going for the drop.

My friend gave me one of these i have a 44 high elf cleric and i like it.. and the name is pretty cool too.

Fun toy
QuoteReply
# Sep 19 2007 at 10:05 PM Rating: Decent
Nexxius
Scholar
53 posts
Have this on my now 44 cleric, was at gunthak beach soloing the undead, this hammer rocks there, best proc was 534 with magic dmg focus, i use the glowing stone of expulsion with muram's anger focus.

This place is great for easy soloing xp for a cleric, sitting on my horse i could fight for a long time without running out of mana.

# Apr 20 2005 at 1:35 PM Rating: Default

From the Devs at SoE.
-----
Dawnfire Morning Star of Light, & Staff of the Undead Legions

The proc rate on both of these weapons was increased to compensate for the lower damage.

Rashere

# Feb 17 2004 at 3:39 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591783356793
15 posts
The price of the dawnfire on Prexus has fell quite abit. I had one but sold it for the extra money. If you can find on for sale on Prexus i would not pay more than 3K.
▲ Page top
RE: Price has fell
QuoteReply
# Sep 11 2004 at 10:13 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1609114782783
View User Forum
Scholar
746 posts
Yes but its still and has always been my favorite weapon. The name is cool, its rare and it has great stats for pre-planar and even beyond. It has to be 40 for the proc cause my 37 cleric cant use it yet =/ oh and I forgot to mention that I got mine for 500pp and the last one I saw sell was for 20k on Karana :)

Edited, Sat Sep 11 11:14:45 2004
▲ Page top
More Bang for Your Buck
QuoteReply
# Mar 13 2003 at 7:00 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591785026327
7 posts
Get a Mage to summon you a damage bracer when you use this. The bracer's effect will work on the proc, making it do about 680 damage on average per proc.

My cleric at level 41 can solo even cons in Lower Guk and never run oom, the only mana I need is to heal myself every two or three mobs.

No need to nuke, the hammer takes about 20 to 60 percent of the average mob's life per proc and so far from my math procs about 1 in 12 swings.
▲ Page top
Two to Tango
QuoteReply
# Feb 26 2003 at 1:53 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250653639
33 posts
Went ahead and grabbed this for my fiance.
My druid is using Heirophant's Crook.
Between Ensnare, Fear Undead, and both
weapon procs, we can duo for a long time.
▲ Page top
I CAN SOLO
QuoteReply
# Nov 22 2002 at 5:04 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591779140129
View User Forum
206 posts
This hammer changed my life.

I can finally solo undead without having to worry about insane downtime. I nuke one mob till it dies and then I melee a few (casting celestial healing on myself) until my mana recovers and then I nuke again.

I can handle all 4 spectres at Oasis with KEI. I just sit on the island after I break the camp. I can handle the feerott spectres pretty consistently with KEI. In Lower Guk, I teamed up with a ghoulbane pally and a SK (for snare) and I would dot the mob and head in for melee (I would get aggro quite a bit if I didn't back off for a few seconds after each proc).

It was quite an upgrade to my Dark Ember (there aren't a lot of tradable upgrades to Dark Ember for a Cleric that wants to have a weapon in hand) I am more excited about this item than I was about any other item I have ever owned. The proc simply RULES.

Edited, Fri Nov 22 16:43:56 2002
▲ Page top
nice item
QuoteReply
# Jan 28 2002 at 1:30 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251324144
View User Forum
4 posts
My wife got this mace last night off of fright. it was procing banish undead for her. not a bad mace. wis and the saves are a plus, even though her wis is around 214 before this item.
▲ Page top
RE: nice item
QuoteReply
# May 30 2002 at 1:23 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250912749
Sage
74 posts
Since the advent of SoL, Everquest calculates mana from wisdom and int different after 200. While I do not believe the impact is as great as it is pre-200, people who have raised their Int or Wis above the 200 mark should be seeing significant increases in total mana as opposed to pre-Luclin mana.
▲ Page top
RE: nice item
QuoteReply
# May 31 2002 at 9:14 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592757464726
261 posts
6 pts of mana per point from 201-252.

# Nov 28 2001 at 11:39 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592247032656
224 posts
Banish Undead
Decrease Hit Points (HP) by 585 (L44)


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Classes: Clr (L44), Nec (L49)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Skill: Evocation
Allowable Targets: Undead

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Range to Target: 200 feet

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Resistance Check: Magic + 5

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Mana Required: 225
Spell Duration: Instant
Casting Time: 5.50 seconds
Spell Recovery: 2.50 seconds

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Spell cast on someone: Soandso staggers.
